geography.data_source: Greater Chennai Corporation ward map 2022, Ambattur Industrial Estate boundary, CMDA master plan

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Chennai district tables (Ambattur taluk), industrial zone worker surveys, higher SC/ST share in industrial labour settlements

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) Tamil Nadu urban tables, Ambattur Industrial Estate employment census, PLFS 2022-23 manufacturing sector data

commute_profile.data_source: CMP Chennai 2018, MTC route data for Ambattur industrial area, many workers live near factory — short commute distance, bicycle usage from industrial worker surveys

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from industrial zone worker behaviour, strong union mobilisation history in Ambattur, high fare sensitivity in low-income zone, Lokniti-CSDS 2024

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from industrial zone social patterns, factory floor networks, strong union connectivity, high tier2 density due to union representatives

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from Ambattur Industrial Estate gate area vendor activity, factory shift-change footfall patterns
Estimated from daily labour gathering points near Ambattur bus stand
Estimated from Ambattur residential area market zone, GCC market survey

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Industrial Zone template from AGENT_SPEC.md, directly applicable — Ambattur is the reference zone for this template

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from strong union presence in Ambattur Industrial Estate, multiple factory management bodies, labour contractor networks
